title: kengia gatacrei
side_effects: Kengia gatacrei can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches in individuals who consume it without proper medical guidance. In rare cases, prolonged use can lead to kidney damage, liver failure, and even seizures. The plant's toxicity can also cause allergic reactions, such as skin irritation, itching, and swelling, in people with sensitive skin. Additionally, improper use of the plant may interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure and heart disease.
